raw: {"perspective": "Security Auditor", "findings": [{"file_path": "apps/api/app/routers/grievance.py", "what_exists": "Formal grievance endpoint for users to challenge AURA scores. Implements ISO 10667-2 §7 and GDPR Art.22 human review. Admin review flow with status transitions.", "what_it_does": "Users file grievances with subject/description; stored verbatim. Admins list pending, resolve/reject with resolution text. SLA tracking via created_at/resolved_at. Rate-limited post-auth.", "quality_assessment": "High. Clean FastAPI patterns, proper auth, audit-aware. Verbatim storage supports regulatory compliance. Rate limit prevents abuse. One gap: no input sanitation beyond length — risk of XSS in admin UI if resolution is echoed unescaped."}], "summary": "Grievance flow is Constitution-compliant and well-implemented. Critical safeguard for automated scoring. Input sanitation missing on description/resolution could enable stored XSS in admin panel if rendered without escaping. Not exploitable to users, but compromises admin surface.", "next_files_to_read": ["apps/web/src/components/admin/grievance-dashboard.tsx", "apps/api/app/middleware/sanitization.py"], "whistleblower_flag": null}

findings.what_exists: Formal grievance endpoint for users to challenge AURA scores. Implements ISO 10667-2 §7 and GDPR Art.22 human review. Admin review flow with status transitions.
findings.what_it_does: Users file grievances with subject/description; stored verbatim. Admins list pending, resolve/reject with resolution text. SLA tracking via created_at/resolved_at. Rate-limited post-auth.
findings.quality_assessment: High. Clean FastAPI patterns, proper auth, audit-aware. Verbatim storage supports regulatory compliance. Rate limit prevents abuse. One gap: no input sanitation beyond length — risk of XSS in admin UI if resolution is echoed unescaped.

summary: Grievance flow is Constitution-compliant and well-implemented. Critical safeguard for automated scoring. Input sanitation missing on description/resolution could enable stored XSS in admin panel if rendered without escaping. Not exploitable to users, but compromises admin surface.
